response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience (~15+ years) with solid fundamentals, TDD practices, and SQL exposure, but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. C++ experience is limited to a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments (2014-2015), far short of the required 5-10 years. There is no Windows platform focus, no fixed income or capital markets domain experience, and no investment banking background. The recent career trajectory is firmly in web/full-stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) rather than C++ systems development.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development experience
Broad polyglot experience including some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby
Solid SQL/database familiarity and proven ability to learn new domains quickly
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience (2014-2015), vastly below the required 5-10 years
Zero capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain experience
No demonstrated Windows platform development; career focused on Linux/web/cloud stacks

key_factors.factor: No financial services / capital markets domain
Strong engineering fundamentals and SQL exposure
